overlays.name: Goal Banner
overlays.author: RL Overlay Hub
overlays.description: Animated banner that appears when a goal is scored, showing the scorer's name. Disappears automatically after 4 seconds.

overlays.name: Minimal Scoreboard
overlays.author: RL Overlay Hub
overlays.description: Clean, transparent scoreboard showing blue score, timer, and orange score. Perfect for competitive streams.
